articles.title: Carney meeting Keir Starmer in London as Iran war disrupts shipping routes
articles.description: LONDON — Prime Minister Mark Carney is meeting in London with his British counterpart Keir Starmer as he wraps up his latest trip abroad. Starmer met Carney at 10 Downing Street this morning and wished him a happy 61st birthday. The two leaders commended each other for their work on supporting Ukrai

articles.title: Behind the scenes at the Oscars: What you didn’t see on camera
articles.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — There’s the Oscars you see on television and the one that takes place off camera. articles.title: Senators led by fourth liners Foegele, Zetterlund in win over Sharks
articles.description: Warren Foegele and Fabian Zetterlund each had a goal and an assist, Drake Batherson scored twice, and Linus Ullmark won for the second time in a little over 24 hours, as the Ottawa Senators overcame multiple deficits en route to defeating the San Jose Sharks 7-4.
